meta.intent: Release pressure after the forecast-row race with a generous lower-first water rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Open the lower puppy first with obvious route groups, extract it with water margin, then pivot to the upper puppy through dock-safe clears.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player spends repeated side clears or finishes upper progress first, making the lower rescue less comfortable but still readable.
meta.whatItProves: A water-order level can rebuild confidence while still ending on a real rescue payoff.
meta.notes: Role: release. Debris, dock, water, and target states only; empty cells are route, spawn, and mobile-readability space.
